Jane Doe
Software Engineer | jane@example.com

EXPERIENCE

Acme Corp — Backend Engineer (2021–2024)
- Built and maintained Python services using FastAPI and PostgreSQL.
- Containerized workloads with Docker and deployed to Kubernetes (k8s).
- Wrote Terraform to provision AWS resources (S3, Lambda, IAM roles).
- Contributed to CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions.
- Mentored two junior engineers; led incident response on P1s.

Globex — Junior Developer (2019–2021)
- Wrote REST APIs in Node.js / Express backed by MongoDB.
- Collaborated with frontend team using React and TypeScript.
- Participated in agile ceremonies; owned a small analytics dashboard in SQL.

EDUCATION
BSc Computer Science, State University, 2019

SKILLS
Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform,
Amazon Web Services, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, FastAPI, Express, React,
